question: Show the ids of high schoolers who have friends and are also liked by someone else.
gold_sql: SELECT student_id FROM Friend INTERSECT SELECT liked_id FROM Likes
gold_sql_original: SELECT student_id FROM Friend INTERSECT SELECT liked_id FROM Likes
gold_sql_canonical: SELECT student_id FROM friend INTERSECT SELECT liked_id FROM likes
agent_sql: SELECT highschooler.ID AS student_id FROM highschooler JOIN friend ON highschooler.ID = friend.student_id JOIN likes ON highschooler.ID = likes.liked_id LIMIT 100
safe_sql: SELECT highschooler.ID AS student_id FROM highschooler JOIN friend ON highschooler.ID = friend.student_id JOIN likes ON highschooler.ID = likes.liked_id LIMIT 100
agent_answer: The query returned 14 high schooler IDs who both have friends and are liked by someone else. The IDs range from 1101 to 1934. A sample of the results includes: 1101, 1247 (appears twice), 1304, and 1468.
